shared_properties: Primary painted tone remains #535353 with transparent cutouts only.
Neck, torso, and tail landmarks stay aligned to the run-core grid.
Outline weight stays at 2 px for readable crouch volume.
differences: Canvas widens to 118x60 px to cover the crouched hitbox footprint.
Two frames alternate hind-leg contact while the head and neck stay low.
Back line drops to keep the top silhouette below low-flying pterodactyl wings.

reference_images.label: offline_sprite_1x
reference_images.purpose: 1x pixel atlas for dinosaur, cactus, pterodactyl, digits, and ground proportions.

reference_images.label: offline_sprite_2x
reference_images.purpose: 2x atlas for silhouette spacing, obstacle spacing, and hit-readability checks.

reference_images.label: run_loop_capture
reference_images.purpose: Run cadence, jump silhouette timing, and restart screen pacing.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load one 236x60 PNG atlas during Loading state and build a 118x60 TextureAtlasLayout for the duck state.
runtime_notes: Advance the atlas index every 0.0833 seconds for a 12 FPS crouch loop.
Swap to the duck collider before horizontal obstacle overlap checks run.
Place the transform anchor at x=80 and y=90 so the lower silhouette stays on the ground line.

context.usage: Displayed while the down input is active and the runner is grounded.

silhouette_notes: Head crest stays at least 28 px lower than the run core silhouette.
Tail occupies a 34 px span and stays parallel to the ground line.
Forearm cluster compresses into a 10x6 px area ahead of the torso.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet canvas is exactly 236x60 px with no gutter between frames.
Top silhouette stays below y=40 within the 60 px frame height.
Collider reference area maps cleanly to a 59x55 px crouch hitbox.
